documentation.title: Vendda Help Center
documentation.description: Complete guide for using Vendda products

products.title: Vendda Commerce
products.description: Create and manage your online store

categories.title: Authentication
categories.description: Manage your account security and access

guides.title: How to Create an Account
guides.description: Step-by-step guide to signing up for Vendda

content.introduction: Creating a Vendda account takes just a few minutes. Once registered, you'll have access to all Vendda products and can start building your online business right away.

steps.title: Go to Vendda
steps.description: Open your web browser and visit vendda.co. Click the 'Get Started' button in the top right corner, or go directly to vendda.co/register

steps.title: Enter Your Details
steps.description: Fill in your business name, email address, phone number, and create a strong password (at least 8 characters with letters and numbers)

steps.title: Accept Terms
steps.description: Review and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

steps.title: Create Account
steps.description: Click the 'Create Account' button to submit your registration

steps.title: Verify Your Email
steps.description: Check your email inbox for a 6-digit verification code (also check your spam folder)

steps.title: Enter Verification Code
steps.description: Enter the code on the verification screen to activate your account

steps.title: Complete Setup
steps.description: Follow the onboarding prompts to set up your first store

tips: Use a business email address for professional communication with customers
Choose a strong password with letters, numbers, and symbols
The verification code expires after 10 minutes - request a new one if needed
content.important: Keep your login credentials safe. Never share your password with anyone.

guides.title: How to Login
guides.description: Access your Vendda account

content.introduction: Access your Vendda dashboard to manage your stores, products, orders, and settings. You can log in from any device with an internet connection.

steps.title: Go to Vendda
steps.description: Visit vendda.co and click 'Login' in the top right corner, or go directly to vendda.co/login

steps.title: Enter Your Email
steps.description: Type your registered email address in the email field

steps.title: Sign In
steps.description: Click the 'Sign In' button to access your dashboard

tips: Enable 'Remember Me' on your personal devices to stay logged in
If you forgot your password, click 'Forgot Password?' to reset it
For security, always log out when using shared or public devices

guides.title: How to Change Password
guides.description: Update your account password for better security

content.introduction: Regularly changing your password helps keep your account secure.

steps.title: Open Settings
steps.description: Click your profile icon and select 'Settings'

steps.title: Confirm Password
steps.description: Re-enter your new password to confirm

tips: Change your password every 3-6 months for optimal security
Don't reuse old passwords
Use a password manager to keep track of complex passwords

guides.title: How to Reset Forgotten Password
guides.description: Recover access to your account if you forgot your password

content.introduction: If you've forgotten your password, you can easily reset it using your email address.

steps.title: Go to Login Page
steps.description: Navigate to the Vendda login page

steps.title: Click Forgot Password
steps.description: Click the 'Forgot Password?' link below the login form

steps.title: Check Email
steps.description: Look for the password reset email (check spam folder too)

steps.title: Click Reset Link
steps.description: Click the link in the email

tips: Password reset links expire after 24 hours
If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder
Contact support if you still can't access your account
content.important: For security reasons, reset links can only be used once and expire after 24 hours.

categories.title: Store Setup
categories.description: Set up and customize your online store

guides.title: How to Create a Store
guides.description: Set up your first online store on Vendda

content.introduction: Creating your store is the first step to selling online. Follow these steps to get your store up and running.

steps.title: Access Dashboard
steps.description: Login and navigate to your dashboard

steps.title: Create New Store
steps.description: Click 'Create New Store' or 'Add Store' button

steps.title: Enter Store Details
steps.description: Fill in store name, description, business category, and store username

steps.title: Create Store
steps.description: Click 'Create Store' and your store is live!

tips: Choose a memorable store name and username that reflects your brand
content.important: The store username becomes your website link... e.g nikestore.vendda.co

guides.title: How to Change Store Template
guides.description: Customize the look and feel of your store

content.introduction: Change your store's template to match your brand and style.

steps.title: Open Store Settings
steps.description: Go to your store dashboard and click 'Store'

steps.title: Preview
steps.description: Click 'Preview' to see how each template looks

tips: Choose a template that matches your products and brand
Mobile-responsive templates work better for all devices
You can change templates anytime without losing your content

guides.title: How to Add Store Locations
guides.description: Add physical store locations or branches

content.introduction: Add your physical store locations to help customers find you and enable in-store pickups.

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Provide location name/branch name, full address, city, and state

tips: Add accurate addresses to help customers find you easily
Include clear directions or landmarks

guides.title: How to Add Delivery Locations
guides.description: Set up delivery zones and shipping fees

content.introduction: Define your delivery areas and set appropriate shipping fees for each zone.

steps.title: Enter Zone Details
steps.description: Provide location name and delivery fee

steps.title: Set Delivery Time
steps.description: Add estimated delivery time for this area

steps.title: Save
steps.description: Click 'Save' and add more zones as needed

tips: For free delivery, add 1 as delivery fee
Offer free delivery for orders above a certain amount
Be realistic with delivery timeframes

categories.title: Product Management
categories.description: Add, edit, and manage your product inventory

guides.title: How to Add a Product
guides.description: List your first product for sale

content.introduction: Adding products is easy! Follow these steps to create your first product listing.

steps.title: Enter Product Details
steps.description: Fill in product name, description, category, and price

steps.title: Add Pricing
steps.description: Set price and compare at price (if on sale)

steps.title: Set Inventory
steps.description: Enter stock quantity, enable inventory tracking

steps.title: Add Variants
steps.description: Create variants (size, color, etc.) if applicable

tips: Use clear, professional photos from multiple angles
Write compelling descriptions highlighting benefits
Include specifications and dimensions

guides.title: How to Edit a Product
guides.description: Update existing product information

content.introduction: Easily update your product information whenever needed.

steps.title: Find Product
steps.description: Use search bar or filter to find the product

steps.title: Open Product
steps.description: Click on the product name or 'Edit' button

steps.title: Make Changes
steps.description: Update any field: text, images, prices, stock

tips: Regularly update product information
Changes go live immediately after saving

guides.title: How to Add Product Categories
guides.description: Organize your products into categories

content.introduction: Categories help customers find products easily and improve your store navigation.
tips: Keep categories simple and intuitive
Don't create too many categories - 5-10 work best

guides.title: How to Bulk Upload Products
guides.description: Upload multiple products at once using CSV

content.introduction: Save time by uploading multiple products at once using a CSV file.

steps.title: Fill in Data
steps.description: Add your products to the template (name, price, description, stock)

steps.title: Review & Confirm
steps.description: Review the preview and confirm import

tips: Follow the template format exactly
Leave optional fields empty if not needed
Upload images separately after import

guides.title: How to Use the Media Library
guides.description: Upload and manage images for your store

content.introduction: The media library stores all your product images and store assets.
tips: Use high-quality images (1000x1000px or higher)
Compress images before uploading for faster loading
Use consistent image sizes across products

guides.title: How to Add a Team Member
guides.description: Invite staff to help manage your store

content.introduction: Add team members to help manage your store with different permission levels.
tips: Use roles to limit access appropriately
Review team permissions regularly

guides.title: How to Manage Staff Permissions
guides.description: Control what each team member can access

content.introduction: Control what each team member can see and do in your store.

steps.title: Select Member
steps.description: Click on the team member to edit

tips: Give minimum necessary permissions
Admins have full access - use sparingly

categories.title: Payments & Shipping
categories.description: Set up payment methods and shipping

guides.title: How to Enable Payment Gateway
guides.description: Set up payment methods to accept online payments

content.introduction: Enable payment gateways to start accepting payments from customers.

steps.title: Enable Gateway
steps.description: Click 'Enable' next to your chosen gateway

steps.title: Configure Preferences
steps.description: Set currency, payment methods to accept

content.important: You must add delivery locations to properly activate this.

guides.title: How to Add Bank Account
guides.description: Set up your bank account to receive payments

content.introduction: Add your bank account details to receive payments from sales.

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Provide bank name and account number

steps.title: Verify Details
steps.description: Ensure name matches your Vendda account

tips: Double-check bank details to avoid delays
Payments are automatically sent when funds are released
content.important: Bank account name must match your Vendda account name.

guides.title: How to Update Order Status
guides.description: Keep customers informed about their order progress

content.introduction: Updating order status keeps customers informed and builds trust.

steps.title: Select Order
steps.description: Click on the order to update

tips: Update order status promptly
Customers receive automatic notifications

guides.title: How to Cancel an Order
guides.description: Cancel orders and process refunds

content.introduction: Cancel orders when items are unavailable or customer requests cancellation.

steps.title: Choose Refund Option
steps.description: Select: Full refund, Partial, or None

tips: Cancel orders as soon as possible if items cannot be fulfilled
You can only cancel orders that haven't been shipped
content.important: Customers are automatically notified when orders are cancelled.

guides.title: How to Enable WhatsApp Notifications
guides.description: Get instant order updates via WhatsApp

content.introduction: Enable WhatsApp notifications to receive instant updates about orders.

steps.title: Verify Number
steps.description: Enter verification code sent to you

tips: Use WhatsApp Business for better management
Respond quickly to improve customer satisfaction

guides.title: How to Add FAQs
guides.description: Create a helpful FAQ section for customers

content.introduction: FAQs help customers find answers quickly and reduce support inquiries.
tips: Answer the most common questions first
Keep answers concise but complete

guides.title: How to Create a Coupon Code
guides.description: Create discount codes to attract customers

content.introduction: Coupon codes are a great way to encourage sales and reward loyal customers.

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Specify name, discount type, and value

tips: Use clear, memorable codes (e.g., SUMMER20)
Set reasonable expiration dates

guides.title: How to Access Analytics
guides.description: View your store's performance metrics

content.introduction: Analytics helps you understand your store's performance, customer behavior, and sales trends.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Log in and navigate to your dashboard

steps.title: Filter Data
steps.description: Use date ranges to analyze periods

tips: Regularly review analytics to identify trends
Use insights to adjust pricing and promotions

guides.title: How to Connect POS Terminal to Software
guides.description: Set up your hardware with Vendda Terminal

content.introduction: Connect your POS terminal to Vendda to start processing in-store sales.

steps.title: Download App
steps.description: Download Vendda Terminal from App Store or Play Store

steps.title: Login
steps.description: Sign in with your Vendda account

steps.title: Connect Hardware
steps.description: Pair your receipt printer via Bluetooth/USB

steps.title: Test Connection
steps.description: Print a test receipt to verify

tips: Ensure Bluetooth is enabled on your device
Keep the app updated for best performance

guides.title: How to Process a Sale
guides.description: Complete a sale on the POS terminal

content.introduction: Process sales quickly and easily with Vendda Terminal.

steps.title: Add Products
steps.description: Search or scan products to add to cart

steps.title: Print Receipt
steps.description: Print or email receipt to customer

tips: Use quick search to find products faster
Keep frequently sold items as favorites

guides.title: How to Add a Customer
guides.description: Add customer details to a sale

content.introduction: Save customer information for future purchases and loyalty tracking.

steps.title: During Checkout
steps.description: Click 'Add Customer' on the cart screen

steps.title: Search Existing
steps.description: Search for existing customer by name or phone

tips: Collect phone numbers for WhatsApp notifications
Build a customer database for marketing

guides.title: How to Print a Receipt
guides.description: Print sales receipts for customers

content.introduction: Print professional receipts for your customers after each sale.
tips: Keep thermal paper stocked
Test printer at start of each day

guides.title: How to Customize Receipt Settings
guides.description: Set up your receipt header and footer

content.introduction: Customize your receipts with your store branding.

steps.title: Edit Footer
steps.description: Add thank you message, return policy

tips: Include your store contact information
Add social media handles for marketing

guides.title: How Offline Mode Works
guides.description: Understand offline sales capabilities

content.introduction: Vendda Terminal works even without internet connection, so you never miss a sale.

steps.title: Data Stored Locally
steps.description: Sales are saved on your device

tips: Ensure products are synced before going offline
Check sync status regularly

guides.title: How to Sync Data
guides.description: Sync offline sales to the cloud

content.introduction: Sync your offline sales to ensure all data is backed up and visible in your dashboard.

steps.title: Manual Sync
steps.description: Pull down to force sync if needed

tips: Sync at least once daily
Use WiFi for faster syncing of large data
content.important: Sales synced appear in your online dashboard within minutes.

guides.title: How to Register Your Business
guides.description: Step-by-step guide to CAC registration

content.introduction: Register your business with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) through Vendda Corp.

steps.title: Access Vendda Corp
steps.description: Navigate to Corp in your dashboard

steps.title: Choose Business Type
steps.description: Select: Business Name, Company, or NGO

steps.title: Search Business Name
steps.description: Check if your desired name is available

tips: Have multiple name options ready in case first choice is taken
Ensure all documents are clear and legible

guides.title: Business Registration Requirements
guides.description: Documents and information needed for registration

content.introduction: Here's what you need to register your business with CAC.

businessName.title: Business Name Registration
documents: Valid ID (passport, driver's license, national ID, or voter's card)
information: Proprietor details (name, address, DOB, phone, email)

tips: Scan documents in high resolution
Ensure photos are passport-sized on white background

guides.title: How to Track Registration Status
guides.description: Monitor your business registration progress

content.introduction: Track the status of your business registration application.

steps.title: Check Status
steps.description: View current status of each application

steps.title: Respond to Queries
steps.description: Address any CAC queries if needed

tips: Respond to queries promptly to avoid delays
Contact support if status doesn't update for 2+ weeks
